--- title: "Alpha Diversity" author: - name: Muluh params: index: default --- ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell} ::: ## Group-wise comparisons - **Index:** shannon - **Group variable:** diet - **Multiple testing correction:** FDR - **Statistical test** Wilcoxon In the report, a suffix of 1~ Baseline and 2~ Week 6 ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell layout-align="center"} ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](alpha_shannon_files/figure-html/fig-figure-of-findings-before-after-1.png){#fig-figure-of-findings-before-after fig-align='center' width=480} ::: ::: ### Table of the top findings #### Across-group ##### Before treatment - Multiple testing correction: **FDR** - Statistical test: **Wilcoxon** ::: {#tbl-table-of-findings-before .cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
``` ::: ::: ##### After treatment - Multiple testing correction: **FDR** - Statistical test: **Wilcoxon** ::: {#tbl-table-of-findings-after .cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
``` ::: ::: ::: {.cell layout-align="center"} ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](alpha_shannon_files/figure-html/fig-figure-of-findings-within-1.png){#fig-figure-of-findings-within fig-align='center' width=480} ::: ::: #### Within-group ##### Paired treatment - Multiple testing correction: **FDR** - Statistical test: **paired Wilcoxon** ::: {#tbl-table-of-findings-paired .cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
``` ::: ::: ### LMM Research Question 1: Did the diet change the microbiota? - The interaction term (Treatment:Timepoint) tests whether the effect of time on Alpha diversity depends on the diet group. - Post-hoc analysis within each diet group identifies specific changes in Alpha diversity over time. Research Question 2: Was the microbiota equal between the diet groups before and after diet? - The main effect of diet tests for differences in Alpha diversity between diet groups at baseline. - Post-hoc analysis across diet groups at each timepoint identifies specific differences between diets Interpret the Results - Main Effects: - diet: Tests for differences in microbiota between Diet A and Diet B at Baseline. - duration: Tests for changes in microbiota over time across both diets. - diet:duration: Tests whether the effect of Timepoint depends on the diet group. - Random Effects: - (1|id): Accounts for within-subject variability. ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell} ::: - Multiple testing correction: **FDR** - Statistical test: **paired Wilcoxon** - Formula used: **~ diet * timepoint + (1 | id)** ::: {#tbl-table-of-interaction .cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}

Week 6 |rice | -0.0644195| 0.0419236| 67.36550| -1.536591| 0.1290773| |Baseline - Week 6 |oat | 0.0627278| 0.0425341| 67.37541| 1.474763| 0.1449340| ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](alpha_shannon_files/figure-html/fig-figure-of-interaction-within-1.png){#fig-figure-of-interaction-within width=672} ::: ::: *Across-Group Comparisons* How to read the results; N.B This interpretation is an example of how to read. - For Marginal Means (emmeans): - Low diversity (e.g., Shannon = 2.5): "The mean Shannon diversity for diet oat was 2.5 (95% CI: 2.3, 2.7), indicating lower microbial diversity compared to typical healthy gut microbiomes (Shannon ~3-5)." - High diversity (e.g., Shannon = 4.2):"The mean Shannon diversity for diet rice was 4.2 (95% CI: 4.0, 4.4), indicating a rich and balanced microbial community." - For Contrasts: - Negative estimate (e.g., -0.8):"diet oat had significantly lower Shannon diversity than diet rice (estimate = -0.8, p < 0.05), suggesting reduced microbial richness." - Positive estimate (e.g., 0.8):"diet oat had significantly higher Shannon diversity than diet rice (estimate = 0.8, p < 0.05), suggesting enhanced microbial balance." ::: {#tbl-table-of-interaction-across-emmeans .cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} Table: Estimated Marginal Means for Diets |diet |timepoint | coef| SE| df| lower.CL| upper.CL| |:----|:---------|--------:|---------:|--------:|--------:|--------:| |rice |Baseline | 4.023754| 0.0646730| 84.09045| 3.895147| 4.152361| |oat |Baseline | 3.973278| 0.0655904| 84.09045| 3.842846| 4.103709| |rice |Week 6 | 4.088173| 0.0650155| 85.45237| 3.958915| 4.217432| |oat |Week 6 | 3.910550| 0.0659479| 85.49222| 3.779439| 4.041661| ::: ::: ::: {#tbl-table-of-interaction-across-contrasts .cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} Table: Estimated contrasts for Diets |contrast |duration | estimate| SE| df| t.ratio| p.value| |:----------|:--------|---------:|---------:|--------:|---------:|---------:| |rice - oat |Baseline | 0.0504763| 0.0921124| 84.09045| 0.5479863| 0.5851531| |rice - oat |Week 6 | 0.1776236| 0.0926074| 85.47258| 1.9180272| 0.0584466| ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](alpha_shannon_files/figure-html/fig-figure-of-interaction-across-1.png){#fig-figure-of-interaction-across width=672} ::: ::: ## Data Summary ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` class: TreeSummarizedExperiment dim: 1700 140 metadata(0): assays(1): relabundance rownames(1700): SGB4933 SGB4285 ...
